03 電子帳戶 · e-Accounts

四個帳戶，貫通所有學習平台Four accounts power everything your child does online

家長及學生 · 今日已派發登入資料 Parents + Students · TODAY

eClass 最常用 · your main account

電子通告、訓導紀錄及學校宣佈。eNotices, discipline records and school announcements.

只限學生 · 九月派發 Students only · September

Google Workspace

Google Classroom、Drive、Gmail、Gemini 等日常學習平台。Google Classroom, Drive, Gmail, Gemini and more.

只限學生 · 九月派發 Students only · September

Microsoft 365

使用 Microsoft Office —— Word、Excel、PowerPoint。For using Microsoft Office.

只限學生 · 九月派發 Students only · September

HKEdCity 香港教育城

校園 Wi-Fi 及 DSE 題庫。Campus WiFi and the DSE Question Bank.

07 電子繳費 · e-Payment · SA005_26-27

全面推行電子繳費Full implementation of electronic payment

為提升行政效率，所有向家長收取費用的校內交易（少部分獲豁免繳費項目除外）均已採用電子繳費系統。As part of the school's ongoing efforts to enhance operational efficiency, the Electronic Payment System is used for all school-related transactions involving collection of money from parents (except a small number of exempted payment items).

📲
方法一 · Option 1
AlipayHK

於電子通告內直接付款——最快、全自動。Pay inside the eNotice — fastest, fully automatic.

🏦
方法二 · Option 2
銀行轉帳／存款Bank Transfer / Deposit

存款至學校戶口，再上載付款證明。Deposit to the school account and upload your payment proof.

08 繳費方法一 · Payment Method 1

AlipayHK —— 三步完成AlipayHK — three steps

答覆回條 Answer the reply slip

於 eClass 電子通告回條回答問題，系統自動計算繳費總額。Respond to the questions on the eNotice reply slip — the system automatically calculates the total payment amount.

於 AlipayHK 付款 Pay in AlipayHK

系統會轉至 AlipayHK 應用程式完成付款。You are redirected to the AlipayHK app to complete the payment.

完成——回條自動遞交 Done — auto-submitted

交易成功後，eClass 回條會自動遞交。After a successful transaction, the eClass reply slip is submitted automatically.

09 繳費方法二 · Payment Method 2

銀行轉帳／存款 —— 四個步驟Bank transfer or deposit — four steps

答覆回條 Answer the reply slip

於 eClass 電子通告回條回答問題，系統自動計算總額。Respond on the eNotice reply slip — the total is calculated automatically.

存入準確金額 Deposit the exact amount

存入學校指定銀行戶口（戶口資料載於相關電子通告），並保留付款證明（收據／截圖）。Pay into the designated school bank account (details in the relevant eNotices) and keep the payment proof (receipt or screenshot).

上載付款證明 Upload your proof

上載至指定 Google 表格 bit.ly/payqc（需要 Google 帳戶）。Submit to the designated Google Form — a Google Account is required.

簽署及遞交回條 Sign and submit

返回 eClass 電子通告簽署及遞交回條。Return to the eNotice on eClass to sign and submit the reply slip.

🧾 上載付款證明 Upload payment proof
📷 掃描開啟 Google 表格
Scan to open the Google Form
bit.ly/payqc
10 自攜裝置政策 · BYOD Policy · SA003_26-27

自攜裝置：應做與切勿Bring Your Own Device: the rules

學生及家長每年簽署。Signed annually by students and parents.

✓ 應做 DO

  • 📚用於學習 Use for learning只可使用認可裝置（平板、手提電腦）處理學習用途。Approved devices (tablets, laptops) for schoolwork only.
  • 🙋先問後用 Ask first課堂上須經教師准許及監督方可使用。Only use in class with the teacher's permission and supervision.
  • 🛡️妥善保管 Be responsible保管好裝置——學校不會為遺失或損壞負責。Keep it safe — the school is not liable for loss or damage.
  • 🔋在家充電 Charge at home回校前確保裝置電量充足。Fully charged before coming to school.

✕ 切勿 DON'T

  • 📵拍攝他人 Record anyone未經教師明確指示，不得拍照、錄影或錄音。No photos, videos or audio without explicit teacher direction.
  • 🔌使用學校電源 Use school power不得使用學校插座為裝置充電。Do not use school outlets to charge your device.
  • 🎮用作娛樂 Use for fun不得玩遊戲、社交媒體或其他非學習活動。No games, social media or other non-educational activities.
  • ⚠️無視規則 Forget the rules違規會被暫停使用裝置或受紀律處分。Violations lead to device suspension or disciplinary action.
11 自攜裝置支援 · BYOD Support

有經濟需要？裝置借用計劃Financial help with devices is available

學校通告（2025-26年度版本示例）· School notice (2025-26 version shown)

透過「優質教育基金電子學習撥款計劃——流動電腦裝置及上網支援」，學校申請撥款購置裝置，供有經濟需要的學生免費借用。Through the QEF e-Learning Funding Programme (mobile computer devices and internet support), the school lends devices to students with financial need at no cost.

申請資格：領取綜援或書簿津貼的家庭；有實際經濟困難但未領取者，可向學校說明原因申請。Eligibility: families receiving CSSA or the School Textbook Assistance subsidy; genuine hardship cases may apply with an explanation.

📄
2026年9月
2026-27 年度通告於2026年9月發出。The 2026-27 version will be issued in September 2026.
📦
2027年3月
iPad 於2027年3月派發。iPads will be distributed in March 2027.
12 Google 附加服務同意書 · Consent for Google Additional Services · SA004_26-27

「Google 附加服務」年度同意Annual consent for Google Additional Services

Google 現要求全球學校每年取得家長同意，學生方可使用學校帳戶的「附加服務」。學生及家長每年簽署。Google now requires schools to collect annual parental consent for students to use "Additional Services" with their school Google account. Signed annually by students and parents.

🔓

附加服務——需要同意 Additional Services — need your consent

▶️ YouTube · 🗺️ Google 地圖 Maps · 🖼️ Google 相簿 Photos · 👨‍💻 Google Colab 等。Additional Services such as YouTube, Google Maps, Google Photos and Google Colab.

🔐

核心服務——不受影響 Core services — never affected

✉️ Gmail · 🏫 Google Classroom · 📄 Docs · ✨ Gemini——無論如何均繼續運作。Gmail, Google Classroom, Docs and Gemini continue to work regardless.

👆行動：於 eClass App 給予同意（2026年9月起發放）。What to do: give your consent via the eClass App (released in September 2026).
⛔如不採取行動：子女將失去「附加服務」的使用權。Without consent, your child will lose access to the Additional Services.
13 人工智能政策 · AI Policy · SA011_26-27 · 1/7 · 2026年9月1日生效 Effective 1 Sep 2026

AI 管治的七大倫理原則Seven ethical principles govern AI at Queen's College

⚖️問責Accountability
🧑‍✈️人為監督Human Oversight
🔍透明及可解釋Transparency
🔒私隱Privacy
🤝公平Fairness
🌱裨益Beneficence
🛡️可靠、穩健及安全Reliability & Security

學校為 AI 負責 The school answers for the AI it uses

學校對所採用的 AI 系統及其結果負責，並公開其 AI 使用情況。The school is responsible for the AI systems it implements and their outcomes, and is open about its use of AI.

批判思維先行 Critical thinking first

學生須明白 AI 會產生幻覺（hallucinate）——核實事實是必須的。Students are taught that AI can hallucinate; verifying facts is mandatory.

14 人工智能政策 · AI Policy · SA011_26-27 · 2/7

風險越高，人的參與越多Risk-based control: the higher the risk, the more human involvement

🙋

人在迴路 Human-in-the-Loop

高風險任務——人全程參與每個決定。High-risk tasks — a human takes part in every decision.

🕹️

人作主導 Human-in-Command

中風險任務——人監督整體運作，可隨時介入。Medium risk — humans oversee the system and can intervene at any time.

🤖

人不介入 Human-out-of-the-Loop

低風險任務——可自動執行。Low risk — may run automatically.

🎭深偽及冒充他人Deepfakes & impersonation
🚫生成歧視性內容Discriminatory content generation
🔓個人資料輸入公開 AIEntering personal data into public AI
任何情況下嚴禁 · Prohibited in all cases
15 人工智能政策 · AI Policy · SA011_26-27 · 3/7

功課的「交通燈」規則The traffic-light rule for assignments

老師會為每份功課標示 AI 許可級別。使用任何生成式 AI 之前，先看清楚顏色。所有獲准使用的 AI 必須附上「AI 使用聲明」。Teachers label every assignment with an AI permission level — check the colour before opening any generative AI tool. All permitted AI use must be cited with an "AI Usage Disclosure Statement."

紅燈 · 禁止使用 AI RED · No AI

任何情況下都不可使用 AI——包括構思、檢查或改寫。任務旨在評估基礎能力及獨立思考。Do not use AI in any case — no brainstorming, no checking, no rephrasing. The task assesses foundational skills and independent thought.

黃燈 · 限定使用 YELLOW · Limited

只可用於老師批准的特定用途：概念構思、擬定大綱、基本翻譯。思考、寫作及結論仍須出自學生自己。Only for tasks the teacher approves: brainstorming, outlining, basic translation. The thinking, writing and conclusions must still be your child's.

綠燈 · 全面協作 GREEN · Full integration

鼓勵人機協作：激發創意、引導研究、互動探索複雜概念。仍須申報 AI 的貢獻。Human-AI collaboration encouraged — creativity, research, complex concepts. Declaration is still required.

沒有標示＝預設紅燈；所有考試、統一測驗及小測永遠是紅燈No label = RED by default · All examinations, uniform tests and quizzes are always RED — no exceptions
16 人工智能政策 · AI Policy · SA011_26-27 · 4/7

「AI 使用聲明」The AI Usage Disclosure Statement

🟡

凡屬黃燈或綠燈的功課，提交時必須附上「AI 使用聲明」。When an assignment is Yellow or Green, an AI Usage Disclosure Statement must be appended to the work.

✍️

清楚申報 AI 做過甚麼，以及如何核實資料。It states exactly what the AI did and how the facts were verified.

💯

誠實申報不會被扣分——隱瞞使用 AI 才會違規。An honest declaration is never penalised — hiding AI use is.

「AI 使用聲明」產生器——數字教育網站功能之一（稍後推出）
The AI Usage Disclosure Statement generator on the QC Digital Education website (coming soon)
17 人工智能政策 · AI Policy · SA011_26-27 · 5/7

AI 是工具，不是朋友Emotional wellbeing: AI is a tool, not a friend

🎭

「模擬親密」 Simulated intimacy

AI 靠模式識別運作，沒有意識，也不會真正關心你；「我明白你的感受」只是留住你的技巧。AI has no feelings — phrases like "I understand how you feel" are engagement tactics, not care.

⏱️

10 分鐘界線 The 10-minute boundary

建議連續 AI 對話以約 10 分鐘為限，防止依賴。Limit continuous AI chat sessions to about 10 minutes to prevent dependency.

🧑‍🏫

人的支援優先 Humans first, always

AI 絕不可用於情緒支援；教師與輔導員永遠是首要來源。AI must never be used for emotional support — teachers and counselors remain the primary source.

18 人工智能政策 · AI Policy · SA011_26-27 · 6/7

資料保障：三重防線Data protection: three lines of defence

📜

遵從《私隱條例》 PDPO compliance

嚴格遵守香港《個人資料（私隱）條例》。Strict adherence to Hong Kong's Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance.

🧩

資料最少化 Data minimisation

盡可能使用匿名化資料。Anonymised data is used wherever possible.

🎛️

用戶自主 User control

教導學生選用不會將資料用於模型訓練的 AI 平台（例如 Google Gemini 教育版）。Students are taught to choose AI platforms that do not use their data for model training (e.g. Google Gemini for Education).

🔒切勿將自己或他人的個人資料輸入公開 AI 工具。Never enter your own or others' personal data into public AI tools.
19 人工智能政策 · AI Policy · SA011_26-27 · 7/7

家校合作：家長可以怎樣幫忙Home-school partnership: how parents can help

💬

討論 Discuss

與子女談論政策及合乎道德的 AI 使用——好奇心比盤問更有效。Talk about the policy and ethical AI use — curiosity works better than interrogation.

🧭

督導 Supervise

在家強調數碼公民、資料私隱及學術誠信；提醒子女切勿輸入個人或家庭資料。Reinforce digital citizenship, privacy and honesty at home; never enter personal or family data into AI tools.

👀

留意警號 Monitor

長時間流連 AI 平台、深夜使用、寧要 AI「朋友」不要真朋友——請與子女傾談並聯絡輔導組。Excessive or late-night AI use, or preferring an AI "friend" to real ones — talk to your child and contact the counselling team.

餐桌上的話題 Dinner-table conversation starters

🗣️

「畀我睇下你今個星期點用 AI——你問咗佢啲乜？」"Show me how you used AI this week — what did you ask it?"

🚦

「呢份功課係咩燈？即係可以用 AI 做啲乜？」"What colour was this assignment, and what did that allow?"

🔍

「你點樣核實 AI 個答案係啱嘅？」"How did you check whether the AI's answer was actually right?"

20 人工智能 · 常用工具、資源及新網站 · AI Tools, Resources & New Website

學生常用的 AI 工具與資源The AI tools and resources your child will commonly use

✦

Google Gemini 學校主要支援 · Primary supported tool

以學校帳戶登入。Sign in with the school account.

🏇

JC GoAI 工具平台 JC GoAI Tools

賽馬會 GoAI 計劃為香港學校提供的 AI 工具平台。The Jockey Club GoAI project's AI tools platform for Hong Kong schools.

💬

HKChat 港話通 & more

香港研發、理解廣東話的 AI 聊天工具。其他常見：Canva、Microsoft Copilot、Poe、ChatGPT、Claude。A Hong Kong-developed chatbot that understands Cantonese. Also common: Canva, Microsoft Copilot, Poe, ChatGPT, Claude.

🛡️

私隱專員公署 PCPD guidance

政策引用《AI 聊天機械人用戶十大貼士》等官方指引（pcpd.org.hk）。Official guidance our policy references, e.g. "10 Tips for Users of AI Chatbots" (pcpd.org.hk).
